string.text: Incoming Transmission
Select Response
Communications Centre
Task received. Check your PDA for details.
Unable to process task request at this time.
Received $amount RU via electronic transfer.
$amount RU deducted from account.
Your reputation in the Zone has improved.
Your reputation in the Zone has suffered.
$faction relations improved by $amount points.
$faction relations decreased by $amount points.
Received: $what
Stash coordinates received. Check your map.
Insufficient funds for this transaction.
WARNING: Hostile contacts detected in your area.
ALERT: Hostile forces approaching your position.
Friendly contacts inbound to your area.
Friendly units have arrived in your sector.
Reinforcements have linked up with your position.
WARNING: Anomalous biological signatures detected.
DANGER: Mutant contact confirmed in your vicinity.
A courier is en route to your location.
You need to have your PDA open to make a choice.
$player_name, it's $npc_name. I've got a couple of spare guys sitting around. You heading into the swamps? Take 'em with you , they need the experience, and you need the backup.
Sure, I can babysit. Send them over.
I'm good, thanks. Maybe next time.
How experienced are they? I don't want rookies getting me killed.
I'll take them, but they'd better listen to orders.
They're on their way. ETA about a minute. Watch each other's backs.
No problem. Offer stands whenever you need an extra gun.
They've been around , not greenhorns. They'll hold their own.
I told them to follow your lead. They'll behave.
none
none
none
none
Alright, send them. I'll wait here.
Can they bring extra ammo? I'm running low.
Actually, I changed my mind. Call them off.
Tell them to hurry , I'm heading out soon.
They're en route. Stand by.
I'll have them pack some extra rounds. Good thinking.
Alright, I'll tell them to stand down. Stay safe.
They're moving fast. You'll see them soon.
spawn_companion:stalker:60,reward_gw:15:stalker
spawn_companion:stalker:60,courier_item:ammo_9x19_fmj,reward_gw:10:stalker
punish_gw:5:stalker
spawn_companion:stalker:60
Hey $player_name, I owe you one for that last favour. I'm sending a runner your way with a little care package. Should be there in a couple of minutes.
You didn't have to do that. What is it?
Thanks, I appreciate it. I'll keep an eye out.
Can you ask the runner to bring something specific? I need meds.
I'm in a firefight right now. Tell him to wait.
Just some medical supplies and a few rounds. Figured you could use 'em. The runner knows your face.
No problem, $player_name. Take care out there.
I'll tell him to grab an extra medkit. He'll be there soon.
He'll hold position until you signal. Stay alive.
courier_item:medkit_army,reward_rep:25
courier_item:medkit_army,reward_gw:10:stalker
courier_item:medkit_army,chance:50:courier_item:medkit_army,reward_gw:5:stalker
none
Clear now. Send him in.
I moved to a different spot. Update his coordinates.
Never mind, I'm good. Tell him to go back.
I'm hurt , I really need that medkit now.
He's on his way to your current position.
Coordinates updated. He'll find you.
Alright, aborting the run.
He's rushing , hang on.
courier_item:medkit_army
courier_item:medkit_army
none
courier_item:medkit_army,reward_gw:10:stalker
$player_name, listen. I just made a big score on an artifact sale, and I remember you helped me out when I was stuck in the north. Let me wire you a share , consider it a thank you.
Wow, thanks! I could use the cash.
Keep it, you earned it. Just buy me a drink sometime.
How much are we talking about?
No need, but if you hear of any work, let me know.
Check your account, the transfer's done. Stay safe.
You're a good man, $player_name. I'll remember that.
5000 RU. Sending it now.
Will do. You're at the top of my list.
reward_money:5000,reward_rep:15
reward_gw:30:stalker
reward_money:5000
reward_gw:20:stalker
Hey $player_name, I stumbled across an old hideout a while back but couldn't carry everything. I marked the spot on the map. If you're nearby, there might be some useful stuff left.
Great, I'll check it out. Thanks!
Why didn't you take everything yourself?
Is it safe? Any mutants around?
I'm busy right now. Can you remind me later?
No problem. Hope you find something good.
I was overloaded and mutants were closing in. Had to bug out. Now the stash is all yours.
It was quiet when I left, but you never know. Stay alert.
Sure, I'll ping you again later. Stay safe.
reward_stash,reward_gw:5:stalker
reward_stash
reward_stash
none
$player_name, reminding you about that stash I mentioned. Still interested?
Yes, send the coordinates again.
No, forget it.
I already found it , thanks!
Tell me more about what's inside.
Coordinates resent. Good luck.
Alright, maybe someone else will grab it.
Great! Hope it was worth the trip.
I only glanced , saw some ammo and a medkit. Could be more.
reward_stash
none
reward_gw:10:stalker
reward_stash
$player_name, I found this compass a while back and it's just gathering dust. Better it goes to someone who actually ventures into the Zone. I'm sending a runner your way with it.
I'll take it! What kind?
Thanks, but I already have one. Pass it to a rookie.
I could trade you something for it.
I'm not heading anywhere dangerous soon. Maybe later.
It's an old military compass. Not the best, but it points north. Runner should be there soon.
Good thinking. I'll find someone who needs it.
What do you have in mind? I'm open to trades.
No problem. Let me know when you're ready.
courier_item:af_compass,reward_rep:10
reward_gw:15:stalker
none
none
I can give you 1000 RU for it.
I have some extra ammo , 200 rounds of 5.45.
Never mind, keep it.
I'll owe you a favour.
Deal. Send the cash and I'll dispatch the runner.
Ammo works. I'll send the compass.
Alright, no problem.
You've got one. Sending the compass now.
punish_money:1000,courier_item:af_compass
courier_item:af_compass,reward_gw:10:stalker
none
courier_item:af_compass,reward_gw:10:stalker
$player_name, still interested in that compass? I've still got it.
Yes, send it now.
No, I'm good.
I changed my mind , I'll take it for free?
Maybe later.
Runner en route.
Alright, I'll hold onto it.
It's free, I said. Sending it.
Just ping me when you're ready.
courier_item:af_compass
none
courier_item:af_compass,reward_gw:5:stalker
none
$player_name, my scout just radioed in , there's a pack of mutants moving through your sector. I'd keep your head on a swivel if I were you. Just a friendly headsâ€‘up.
Appreciate the warning. Any idea what kind?
Thanks, I'll be careful.
How far are they?
I can handle mutants. Thanks anyway.
Couldn't say for sure, but they're moving fast. Might be dogs or worse. Watch your six.
No problem. Stay alive out there.
About 500 meters east of you. They're closing in.
I know you're tough, but these ones look nasty. Be careful.
none
chance:100:spawn_mutant:random:90,reward_gw:5:stalker
none
chance:100:spawn_mutant:random:90
I'll find a good spot to ambush them. Thanks.
I'm going to hide until they pass.
Can you send someone to help?
I'm leaving the area. Which way should I go?
Good luck. Hope you thin them out.
Wise move. Stay quiet.
I can't spare anyone, sorry. You're on your own.
Head west , that sector is clear for now.
chance:100:spawn_mutant:random:60,reward_gw:10:stalker
none
chance:100:spawn_mutant:random:60,punish_gw:5:stalker
none
$player_name, I've been hearing good things about you around the campfires. Keep it up , the Zone needs more stalkers like you.
Thanks, that means a lot.
I just do what needs to be done.
What exactly are they saying?
I appreciate that. Let me know if you need help.
Just the truth. See you around.
Humility suits you. Stay safe.
That you're reliable, fair, and dangerous when needed. All good things.
I'll keep that in mind. Same to you.
reward_rep:30
reward_rep:50
reward_rep:20,reward_gw:10:stalker
reward_rep:30,reward_gw:10:stalker
$player_name, feeling lucky? I'll flip a coin , if you call it right, I'll send 1000 RU to your account. If you're wrong, you owe me a thousand. Quick game?
req_money:1000
Heads.
Tails.
I don't gamble.
Double or nothing? Let's make it 2000.
Coin's in the air... it's heads! You win.
Tossing... tails! Sorry, you lose.
Your loss. Maybe next time.
Feeling lucky? Alright, 2000 it is.
none
none
none
none
Great! Send the money.
Damn. I'll transfer it now.
Best of three?
You cheated!
Check your account , money's on its way.
Received. Good game.
Alright, one more flip. Same stakes?
It was fair. Pay up or take another game.
reward_money:1000
punish_money:1000
none
punish_gw:20:stalker,chance:50:punish_money:1000
Heads (2000).
Tails (2000).
Changed my mind. Cancel.
Let's just do the original 1000.
Flipping... heads! You win 2000.
Flipping... tails! You lose 2000.
Alright, maybe next time.
Sure, back to 1000.
reward_money:2000
punish_money:2000
none
none
$player_name, I've got a line on a rare artifact, the 'Moonlight'. The seller wants 3000 RU upfront, but I'm short. If you spot me the cash, I'll cut you in on the resale , we'll double our money.
req_money:3000
Alright, I trust you. Sending the money.
Sounds fishy. Count me out.
I'll give you 2000, and you cover the rest.
Prove it's real. Send me a picture.
Thanks! I'll meet the seller now, get the artifact, and be in touch. This is going to be great!
Your call. I thought you trusted me.
I'll take 2000, but my share will be smaller. Deal?
I don't have a camera, but trust me , it's legit.
punish_money:3000
none
punish_money:2000
none
So? Did you get it?
I knew it was a scam. I want my money back.
What happened?
If you ripped me off, I'll find you.
I got it! Sending a runner with your share now.
The seller vanished. I'm sorry , I'll pay you back somehow.
It was a setup. I lost the money too.
Calm down. I'll make it right.
chance:50:courier_item:af_electra_moonlight,chance:50:reward_money:6000,chance:80:punish_gw:20:stalker
chance:30:reward_money:3000,chance:100:punish_gw:30:stalker
punish_gw:20:stalker
punish_gw:10:stalker,chance:50:spawn_hostile:stalker:120
$player_name, we need to talk. I heard you've been spreading rumors about me. You know I can see this.
I never said anything. You're paranoid.
Look, if I said something, I didn't mean it. Let's talk this out.
Yeah, I told a few people. You were being a greedy bitch.
Who told you that? Let me confront them.
Paranoid? I'd be too if I were you , someone might pay you a visit.
You'll regret this $player_name.
This ain't an online forum. We'll find you.
I'm not naming names. Just stop.
none
none
none
none
I'm sorry. Let's forget this.
Come at me, then.
I can prove I didn't say anything.
You're mistaken. Drop it.
Fine. But watch your back.
You asked for it.
Too late for proof. The damage is done.
I know what I heard. This isn't over.
punish_gw:30:stalker,chance:30:spawn_hostile:stalker:120
spawn_hostile:stalker:90,punish_gw:50:stalker
punish_gw:20:stalker
punish_gw:40:stalker,chance:50:spawn_hostile:stalker:120
$player_name, I've got a spare scientific medkit , the good stuff, not the army junk. I'll let it go for 2500 RU. I'll send a runner to you once you wire the cash.
req_money:2500
Deal. Transferring the money now.
Too rich for me. Thanks anyway.
I'll give you 2000.
Can I trade something instead?
Got the payment. Runner is on the way with your medkit. Should be there in a couple of minutes.
No worries. Let me know if you change your mind.
Can't go that low. 2400 final.
What do you have in mind?
punish_money:2500,courier_item:medkit_scientic,reward_gw:10:stalker
none
none
none
2400 works. Sending now.
Still too high. I'll pass.
I'll give you 2000 and some ammo.
I have a spare artifact. Trade?
Payment received. Runner en route.
Alright, maybe next time.
What ammo? If it's 5.45, we have a deal.
Which artifact? I might be interested.
punish_money:2400,courier_item:medkit_scientic
none
punish_money:2000,courier_item:medkit_scientic
courier_item:medkit_scientic,reward_gw:15:stalker
$player_name, I heard you're heading up north. I'm sending two of my best guys to back you up. They're tough bastards, they'll meet up at your PDA coords in a few minutes.
Thanks, I appreciate it. I'll wait for them.
I work alone. Call them off.
Are they well armed?
I'll take them, but tell them to hurry.
They're on their way. Good luck.
Alright, I'll tell them to stand down.
They've got AKs and plenty of ammo. They'll be fine.
They're moving fast. ETA 2 minutes.
none
none
none
none
I see them , thanks again.
They're not here yet. What's taking so long?
I heard gunfire in the distance , hope they're okay.
I changed my mind, tell them to go back.
Good hunting together.
They ran into some mutants. ETA 3 more minutes.
We lost contact with them. Be careful.
Too late, they're already en route. They'll find you.
spawn_companion:stalker:30,reward_gw:10:stalker
spawn_companion:stalker:90,chance:30:spawn_mutant:random:30
chance:50:spawn_hostile:bandit:90,punish_gw:20:stalker
spawn_companion:stalker:60,punish_gw:5:stalker
$player_name, I'm sending a supply drop to your coordinates , some ammo and food. My runner is en route. Should be there soon.
Great, I could use the supplies.
Wait , how do I know it's really you? This feels off.
What's the runner look like?
I'm in a bad spot. Tell him to approach carefully.
Just look for the guy in the brown jacket. He's got my mark.
What? Of course it's me. Who else would send you free stuff?
Brown jacket, bald, carries a shotgun. You'll know him.
He'll be careful. Just give a signal when clear.
none
none
none
none
I see someone , thanks!
He's not responding. Something's wrong.
The guy I see is wearing a brown jacket, but he's armed with a rifle.
I don't see anyone. Did he get lost?
Good! Tell me what he brought.
Damn. I lost contact with him. Be ready.
That's not my guy. I'm sorry , something went wrong.
He should be there. Maybe he's delayed.
courier_item:ammo_9x19_fmj,reward_gw:10:stalker
chance:50:spawn_hostile:bandit:60,punish_gw:10:stalker
spawn_hostile:bandit:60,punish_gw:30:stalker
none
$player_name! *hic* I've had a few too many, but I remembered you like to unwind. I'm sending my boy with a joint , the good stuff, from my personal stash!
Uh, thanks? Hope the runner is sober.
You're high. Call it off before he gets lost.
I love that! Send it!
Can you send some food too?
He's fine! He knows the way. Joint incoming!
Nonsense! He's on his way. You'll get your joint.
That's the spirit! *hic* It's on its way.
I'll tell him to grab some boar chops too.
chance:60:courier_item:joint,chance:40:punish_rep:5
chance:30:courier_item:joint
chance:80:courier_item:joint,chance:20:courier_item:joint
chance:60:courier_item:joint,chance:30:courier_item:mutant_part_boar_chop
$player_name, I'm in a tight spot. A trader has a rare artifact I need, but he won't take credit. If you could loan me 4000 RU, I'll pay you back 5000 when I sell it. I'm good for it.
req_money:4000
Alright, I trust you. Sending the money.
Sorry, I can't spare that much.
I'll lend you 3000, that's all I have.
What artifact is it? Maybe I'll buy it myself.
Thank you! I'll wire you the repayment as soon as I sell it. Should be within the hour.
I understand. I'll figure something else out.
3000 helps. I'll pay back 4000. Deal?
It's a "Moonlight" , very rare. If you want it, I'll step aside.
punish_money:4000
none
punish_money:3000
none
Did you get the artifact?
Where's my money?
If you're scamming me, I'll be angry.
No rush, just let me know.
I got it! Selling it now , transferring your 5000.
The deal fell through. I lost the money. I'm sorry.
It's a scam. I got robbed. I'll pay you back slowly.
I haven't found a buyer yet. Soon.
reward_money:5000,reward_gw:20:stalker
punish_gw:40:stalker,chance:50:spawn_hostile:stalker:120
punish_gw:30:stalker
none
I'll buy it. Send me the trader's info.
Never mind, you take it.
How much does he want?
We can go halfsies , I'll pay 2000, you pay 2000.
He's at the merc base. Ask for "Toad". Tell him I sent you.
Alright, I'll get it then.
4000, firm.
That works. Let's do it.
none
punish_money:4000,reward_stash
none
punish_money:2000
4000 it is. I'll go.
Too much. You buy it.
I'll give you 4000 and you go get it for me.
Maybe later.
Good luck. Trader's name is Toad at the merc base.
Alright, I'll handle it.
I can do that. Send the money and I'll go.
No problem.
none
punish_money:4000,reward_stash
punish_money:4000,chance:80:courier_item:af_electra_moonlight
none

$player_name, got a weird one for you. Some fixer at the edge of town swore he has a locked crate with equipment—might be useful, might be cursed. He wants someone to grab it from a derelict outpost. I can pay you, or we can split the kit. Interested?
Sounds like a score. Tell me where and I'll take it.
Why are you asking me? What's in the crate?
Fuck that. Too risky for a mystery box.
I might do it — but I want an advance payment before I move.
Good. It's near the old watchtower, north-west of $current_level. Avoid the broken bridge. I'll mark a rough pinpoint on your PDA.
He says tools, a comms module, and maybe some sealed boxes. Could be legit gear, could be traps. He trusts you more than strangers—figure of speech, you know how the Zone is.
Fair enough. Not everyone wants to crawl through rust and rot for a gamble. If you change your mind, ping me.
Alright, you greedy bastard. I can spare 2000 RU now if you go. Otherwise we split after you bring the crate back. Your call.
none
none
none
punish_money:2000
I'll head there at dusk. Any enemies known around the watchtower?
Give me the exact coordinates and any tips. I don't want surprises.
I'm taking a buddy. Don't double-cross me.
You said split — what's my cut if the crate is good?
Watch for mutated dogs and a few bandit patrols that like to loiter near the creek. Move quiet and use cover. The watchtower's interior is unstable.
Pin marked. Keep left of the birch line, the ground's safer there. Bring a crowbar or a lockpick — the crate's sealed.
Fine. I'll tell the runner not to interfere. But if your friend steals anything, you're on your own.
Half after inspection unless you bring back proof first. If it's scrap, 30% to you, 70% to the fixer. If it's rare gear, we split 50/50.
none
none
none
none
I reached the tower. Crate's sealed and heavy. I can carry it but will be slow.
The crate's gone, some scavvers took it. I can track them for a share.
Crate opened itself—there's a weird humming and a sealed device inside. I didn't touch it.
Ambushed by bandits. I'm pinned down and bleeding.
Good work. Move slow, cut across the marsh to avoid patrols. If you can, stash it somewhere temporary and meet me at the bar to sort it out.
Shit. Track them, but don't run into trouble. Offer them a trade or scare them off. If you get it back, I'll give you an extra 1000 RU for the hassle.
Do not bring that anywhere near electronics or your suit. Leave it sealed and come back. I'll contact a friend who knows weird crap. We might get paid well—or poisonous.
Hold on. Try to find cover and bandage up. If you have a flare or smoke, use it now. I'm sending a runner with a medkit, but it might draw attention.
none
chance:70:spawn_hostile:bandit:90,reward_money:1000
chance:50:courier_item:af_atom,chance:30:punish_rep:10
chance:100:courier_item:medkit_army,chance:40:spawn_hostile:bandit:60,punish_gw:10:stalker
I'm stashing the crate. Meet me at the bar and we'll open it together.
I'm taking the crate straight to the fixer for the cash. No splits.
I want a bigger cut—give me 40% now or I walk.
The crate hums. I'm leaving it and burning the rest. Not worth the risk.
Smart. We'll open it in public, fewer surprises. I'll be there—don't let anyone else find it.
Coward's pay is quick and clean. Fine. Bring it and take your money. Expect the fixer to ask questions though.
You always were greedy. I'll give you 30% advance if you can prove the crate's intact. No proof, no extra. Deal?
Can't blame you. Some things light up for a reason. Walk away, and I'll keep my mouth shut. Live to stalk another day.
reward_gw:10:stalker
reward_money:3000,punish_gw:5:stalker
chance:100:reward_money:1500,punish_rep:10
punish_gw:5:stalker
We opened it at the bar. It's gear—comm unit, scopes, and a sealed crate of strange tech. Split it.
I took it to the fixer. He paid and then said someone tipped him off. I think I was set up.
The device inside pulsed and the sky went weird—I left it sealed and walked. Didn't touch it.
I tried to trade the crate for ammo but ended up in a shootout. Lost the crate and some friends.
Nice haul. We split as promised. Take your share and keep a low profile for a week. Some heads might get jealous.
Shit. You're lucky if you walked away. Here's 1000 RU for your trouble. I'll see if I can find who leaked it.
Smart and boring. Sometimes the Zone keeps its secrets. I'll mark a stash for you with some food and a small reward.
Bloody mess. I'm sorry, mate. I'll try to replace what I can, but this one stings. Keep your head down.
chance:70:reward_stash,chance:30:courier_item:wpn_pm,reward_gw:20:stalker
reward_money:1000,punish_gw:10:stalker,chance:30:spawn_hostile:bandit:120
reward_stash,reward_rep:10
punish_gw:20:stalker,punish_rep:20,chance:50:reward_money:500
Anyone been seeing more mutants around the Garbage lately?
Yeah, ran into a pack not long ago.
Figures. Something must've stirred them up. Zone never stays quiet for long.
true
Any idea what's causing it?
Hard to say. Heard rumors of a fresh anomaly cluster forming out there. Mutants get restless when the Zone shifts.
New mutant activity rumors logged in your PDA.
No more than usual.
Lucky you. I nearly walked into a couple of snorks last night. Nearly needed a fresh pair of pants.
The stalker laughs it off and the chat ends.
Stay sharp out there.
You too. The Zone's been in a bad mood lately.
Conversation ends on a cautious note.
$player_name, it's $npc_name. You near $current_level? I might've stumbled onto something interesting earlier.
Depends. What did you find?
Small anomaly cluster north of my position. Looked fresh, like the Zone just coughed it up. I swear I saw something shiny sitting in the middle.
none
Sounds like trouble. I'm not chasing every rumor.
Fair enough. In the Zone, curiosity kills more stalkers than bullets.
Conversation ends.
If it's real, why not grab it yourself?
Because the ground around it is buzzing like a transformer station. I'm not suicidal. Thought maybe we could figure something out together.
none
Alright. What do you need?
I can guide you to the spot. If there's really an artifact there, we split the profit. Fair deal.
none
How do I know this isn't a trap?
In the Zone? You never know. But if I wanted you dead I'd keep quiet and let the mutants do the job.
none
Forget it. Too risky.
Suit yourself. Someone else will take the gamble sooner or later.
Conversation ends.
Fine. Send me the location.
Coordinates sent. Watch your step when you get there. The Zone likes to punish greedy stalkers.
reward_stash
If we split it, I take the bigger cut.
Greedy, huh? Fine. But if this turns ugly I'm blaming you.
chance:40:spawn_mutant:random:90
Forget the artifact. Just tell me if the area is safe.
Safe? Nothing in the Zone is safe. But I haven't seen mutants nearby... yet.
reward_rep:3
If this pays off, drinks are on you.
If we both survive it, I'll buy the whole bar a round.
reward_gw:5:stalker
Just stay alive until I get there.
No promises. The Zone writes its own endings.
Conversation ends.
$player_name, this is $npc_name. Got a weird request for you. Nothing heroic, just Zone logistics.
Logistics? Since when do stalkers use that word?
Since running supplies through $current_level became more dangerous than artifact hunting. I've got gear that needs to reach a buddy, but the roads are crawling.
none
Sounds like someone else's problem.
Yeah, that's what everyone keeps saying. Hard to move anything in the Zone when every stalker thinks like that.
Conversation ends.
Depends what I'm getting out of it.
Fair question. I can send a courier with something useful once the delivery's done.
none
What exactly are we moving?
Nothing explosive, relax. Just medical supplies and spare parts. Someone out there will be grateful.
none
Why not send your own guys?
Because the last two never reported back. Either the mutants got them, or someone else did.
none
Yeah... that sounds cursed. I'm out.
Can't blame you. The Zone eats couriers for breakfast.
Conversation ends.
Alright. I'll help. Send the route.
Sending coordinates now. Once it's done, I'll have a runner bring your payment.
none
If I get shot doing this, I'm haunting you.
Deal. But ghosts don't get paid, so try to stay alive.
chance:35:spawn_hostile:bandit:120
Just send the supplies directly. I'll cover the courier if needed.
That actually helps a lot. I'll send someone your way soon.
courier_item:medkit
So what's the payment?
If everything goes smoothly, expect a little surprise package.
chance:60:courier_item:bandage
Next time, hire someone crazier than me.
In the Zone? You're already near the top of that list.
reward_gw:6:stalker
Let's hope the Zone is in a generous mood today.
It rarely is, but sometimes it forgets to kill you. That's good enough.
reward_rep:4
$player_name, you still listening on that PDA? This is $npc_name. I might have stumbled onto something interesting near $current_level.
"Interesting" usually means dangerous. Go on.
Dangerous, yeah. But profitable too. I spotted an artifact earlier, but something about the place gave me bad vibes.
none
Why are you telling me instead of grabbing it yourself?
Because the Zone has a way of punishing greedy stalkers. I figured a partnership might improve the odds.
none
This sounds like a scam.
Fair enough. Zone's full of liars. But I'm offering information, not asking for your wallet.
none
Not interested. Good luck.
Suit yourself. If someone else grabs it, don't complain later.
Conversation ends.
Alright. Where exactly is this artifact?
Near a cluster of anomalies. I didn't stay long enough to identify the artifact type.
none
Sounds like bait for a trap.
Maybe. But I haven't seen anyone around. If it is bait, someone is very patient.
chance:25:spawn_hostile:bandit:120
If the artifact is real, what's my cut?
Fifty-fifty. That's fair for information.
none
Fine. Send me the coordinates.
Coordinates sent. Be careful. The place felt... wrong.
reward_stash
I'll pass. Too risky.
Probably the smart decision. The Zone punishes curiosity.
reward_rep:2
You go first. I'll watch your back.
Heh. That's one way to test my honesty.
spawn_companion:stalker:60
Actually... how about you pay me for the risk?
You're pushing it, but fine. I'll send something small.
courier_item:bandage
If this turns out to be junk, I'm blaming you.
That's fair. But if it's real, drinks are on you.
reward_gw:8:stalker
Let's hope nobody else finds it first.
In the Zone? Someone probably already tried and died.
chance:30:spawn_mutant:random:90
Next time you find treasure, call me sooner.
Next time I might just keep it to myself.
reward_rep:4
